'''SecuriCo''' was a localized company in the [[Indellian system/Legends|Indellian system]]. The company specialized in the production of security systems. SecuriCo took pride in the strength of their technology and made a point of selling to major installations. A SecuriCo security system was installed on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] to protect its important computer core.

{{Company-stub}}
